text:
is a Japanese male mangaka and designer.

Works

Theatrical Films

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone (2007) - Design
Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance (2009) - Design
Space Battleship Yamato 2199 (movie) (2012) - Design Assistant

TV Anime/OVA

Neon Genesis Evangelion (anime) (1995) - Assistant Character Design, Design Assistant (eps 1-2, 5, 10)
Blue Submarine No. 6 (1998) - Mechanical Design (Blue No. 3 and No. 8., Uncredited)
Leatherman (OVA) (2001) - Original Creator
Sentou Yousei Yukikaze (2002) - Mechanical Design, Script (Episode 5)
Kishin Taisen Gigantic Formula (2007) - Military Concept design
Space Battleship Yamato 2199 (TV) (2012) - Design Assistant

Published Works

Sore o Nasumono: Neon Genesis Evangelion Concept Design Works (1998) - Illustrator
[Nama] Shibori Ichiban (1999) - Writer, Illustrator
Leatherman (2000) - Writer, Illustrator
Rokudou-kun no Ienai Riyu (2002) - Writer, Illustrator
Disturbance Hips (2002) - Writer, Illustrator
Tokumei Shoujo (2004) - Writer, Illustrator
Datsui Shigan (2004) - Writer, Illustrator
Kaikyaku Yuugi (2005) - Writer, Illustrator
Datte, Yokujou Shitai n da mon. (2007) - Writer, Illustrator
Erotic Dolce (2009) - Writer, Illustrator
Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA (2008) - Guest Mechanic design
Neon Genesis Evangelion: ANIMA Visual Book (2010) - Guest Mechanic design
Joujou Time (2010) - Writer, Illustrator
XYZ Hakusho (2013) - Writer, Illustrator
